languages.text: {n}Вскоре в корневой системе Заркова выросли целые пласталевые и адамантиновые бастионы. Но направлены эти оборонные рубежи были не вовне, а вовнутрь. Бои были кровавыми и яростными, но, несмотря на потери, Погонщицы были почти полностью истреблены.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вскоре в корневой системе Заркова выросли целые пласталевые и адамантиновые бастионы. Но направлены эти оборонные рубежи были не вовне, а вовнутрь. Бои были кровавыми и яростными, но, несмотря на потери, Погонщицы были почти полностью истреблены.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Soon, within the root system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. However, their defensive lines were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet, despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly exterminated.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вскоре в корневой системе Заркова выросли целые пласталевые и адамантиновые бастионы. Но направлены эти оборонные рубежи были не вовне, а вовнутрь. Бои были кровавыми и яростными, но, несмотря на потери, Погонщицы были почти полностью истреблены.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Soon, within the root-system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. Yet these defensive works were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly annihilated.{/n}

{n}Soon, within the root system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. However, their defensive lines were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet, despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly exterminated.{/n}

{n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

{n}Soon, within the root-system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. Yet these defensive works were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly annihilated.{/n}

{n}Soon, within the root system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. However, their defensive lines were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet, despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly exterminated.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ザルコフの根系に、すぐにプラステールとアダムタイトの要塞が築かれた。しかし、その防御の境界は外に向けられたのではなく、内側に向けられていた。戦いは激しく、多くの犠牲者が出たが、それでもドレーバーはほぼ完全に消滅した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Whole bastions of plasteel and adamantine soon sprang up in Zarkov's root system, but these defensive boundaries were directed inward, not outward. The battles were bloody and fierce, but despite the casualties, the Drovers were almost completely eliminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの根系に、すぐにプラステールとアダムタイトの要塞が築かれた。しかし、その防御の境界は外に向けられたのではなく、内側に向けられていた。戦いは激しく、多くの犠牲者が出たが、それでもドレーバーはほぼ完全に消滅した。

languages.text: {n}No mucho después, se alzaron bastiones enteros de plastiacero y adamantino entre las raíces de Zarkov. Sin embargo, estas líneas defensivas no bloqueaban el camino al interior, sino al exterior. La lucha fue sangrienta y feroz, pero, a pesar de las numerosas pérdidas, los Pastores quedaron prácticamente exterminados.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Soon, within the root system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. However, their defensive lines were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet, despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}No mucho después, se alzaron bastiones enteros de plastiacero y adamantino entre las raíces de Zarkov. Sin embargo, estas líneas defensivas no bloqueaban el camino al interior, sino al exterior. La lucha fue sangrienta y feroz, pero, a pesar de las numerosas pérdidas, los Pastores quedaron prácticamente exterminados.{/n}

languages.text: {n}不久之后，扎尔科夫纵横交错的根系之间，一座座由塑钢与精金构筑的堡垒相继崛起。然而，这些防线并非针对外敌，而是指向根系。战斗血腥而惨烈，尽管付出了惨痛代价，拒生花最终还是几乎被铲除殆尽。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Soon, within the root system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. However, their defensive lines were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet, despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}不久之后，扎尔科夫纵横交错的根系之间，一座座由塑钢与精金构筑的堡垒相继崛起。然而，这些防线并非针对外敌，而是指向根系。战斗血腥而惨烈，尽管付出了惨痛代价，拒生花最终还是几乎被铲除殆尽。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bald entstanden in Zarkovs Wurzelsystem ganze Bastionen aus Plaststahl und Adamant. Ihre Verteidigung war allerdings nicht nach außen, sondern nach innen gerichtet. Der Kampf war blutig und grausam, aber trotz der Verluste wurden die Treiber fast vollständig ausgelöscht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Soon, within the root system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. However, their defensive lines were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet, despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bald entstanden in Zarkovs Wurzelsystem ganze Bastionen aus Plaststahl und Adamant. Ihre Verteidigung war allerdings nicht nach außen, sondern nach innen gerichtet. Der Kampf war blutig und grausam, aber trotz der Verluste wurden die Treiber fast vollständig ausgelöscht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kısa sürede Zarkov'un kök sisteminin içinde tümüyle plasçelik ve adamantinden oluşan burçlar yükseldi. Ancak savunma hatları dışa değil, içe dönüktü. Çatışmalar kanlı ve vahşiydi, yine de kayıplara rağmen Çobanlar neredeyse tamamen yok edildi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Soon, within the root system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. However, their defensive lines were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet, despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kısa sürede Zarkov'un kök sisteminin içinde tümüyle plasçelik ve adamantinden oluşan burçlar yükseldi. Ancak savunma hatları dışa değil, içe dönüktü. Çatışmalar kanlı ve vahşiydi, yine de kayıplara rağmen Çobanlar neredeyse tamamen yok edildi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Très vite, le système racinaire de Zarkov fut mis à contribution pour la fabrication en masse de plastacier et d'adamantine. Cependant, leurs lignes de défense n'étaient pas tournées vers l'extérieur, mais vers l'intérieur. S'ensuivirent des luttes acharnées et sanglantes, et malgré les lourdes pertes, les Chasseurs furent presque éradiqués.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Soon, within the root system of Zarkov, entire bastions of plasteel and adamantine rose. However, their defensive lines were not directed outward, but inward. The fighting was bloody and ferocious, yet, despite the losses, the Drovers were nearly exterminated.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Très vite, le système racinaire de Zarkov fut mis à contribution pour la fabrication en masse de plastacier et d'adamantine. Cependant, leurs lignes de défense n'étaient pas tournées vers l'extérieur, mais vers l'intérieur. S'ensuivirent des luttes acharnées et sanglantes, et malgré les lourdes pertes, les Chasseurs furent presque éradiqués.{/n}
